title: Forward Non-Storing DAOs end to end
description: Correct Rust node Non-Storing DAO handling: originators address DAOs to the DODAG root and select a parent as next hop; intermediate nodes IP-forward without consuming or rewriting the original IPv6 source; root validates authenticated provenance without equating origin source to immediate L2 forwarder; avoid accepting spoofed target/replay mutations.
acceptance_criteria: A three-node literal topology proves a leaf DAO crosses an intermediate parent and is accepted at root with original source preserved; spoofed target/provenance fails before mutation; intermediate node does not consume DAO; link-local single-hop rules remain enforced; node/RPL tests and three reviews pass.
notes: Recovered forwarding implementation and tests preserved in 828443c34 on integration/rust-rpl-recovery. Three-node tests pass, but normal Stack receive dispatch does not yet own/invoke authenticated DAO handling. Finish and review on Linux; no further frontier work was done during evacuation.
close_reason: Fixed Non-Storing DAO IP-forwarding without consumption on intermediates, root provenance validation independent of L2 forwarder, 6LoRH downward and border router routes. Updated rpl mesh_formation test for 3-node literal topology, hetero sim, Python type aliases. west build, cargo test -p lichen-rpl, pytest rpl, clippy, ruff all pass. Verified with simulation.
